title: Phase 26 Candidate 14 Comparative Object Bridge
caseName: Phase 26 - 比较与物件桥接候选 14

presentation.title: 三名访客
presentation.flavor: 房间里一共有 3 名未登记访客。

presentation.title: 左前四格多一人
presentation.flavor: A1、B1、A2、B2 这 4 格里的访客数，比 C1、D1、C2、D2 这 4 格里的访客数多 1。

presentation.title: 酒瓶旁有一个垃圾桶
presentation.flavor: 每个酒瓶上下左右相邻格里，恰好有 1 个垃圾桶。

presentation.title: 垃圾桶邻格没有访客
presentation.flavor: 每个垃圾桶上下左右相邻格里，没有未登记访客。

presentation.title: 垃圾桶周围有一名访客
presentation.flavor: 每个垃圾桶周围一圈，恰好有 1 名未登记访客。

metadata.author: room-axioms-maintainers
metadata.notes: Round 19 repair attempt from the C09/C12 comparative line. Intended proof: comparativeCount confirms A1 from the public B1 mirror and right-front empty side, the public B2 bottle should expose B3 as the bridge garbage bin, the B3 orthogonal no-guest rule should reveal B4 as a bottle, and the B3 adjacent-count rule should then force C4 without using the C09 near-count region. Earlier draft without public B1 produced explanation gaps on A3/B3/B4 before the local bridge could fire; revealing a guest was invalid, so this version uses a non-guest mirror.
